effect.name: drop
effect.description: Drop in from above with a slight overshoot, then settle. On leave it drops downward out of view. Works as a slide transition and as a build (enter/exit).
effect.aiSpec: Content falls in from above with a slight overshoot and settles, then drops downward out of view on leave (paired with a fade). Works as both a slide transition and a build enter/exit. Gives a sense of things arriving with light physical weight. Choose it for a gravity-themed, top-down feel; for purely horizontal motion use slide/glide, and for the calmest neutral reveal use fade.

snippet.label: Transition: drop
snippet.description: Drop into this slide from above.

snippet.label: Build: drop (step)
snippet.description: Reveal a range at a build step with a drop-in.
